## Research
<div class="research-intro">
My research focuses on AI-driven materials discovery, with a particular emphasis on inverse design using generative models. I am also interested in MLIPs, agentic AI, and computational simulations including DFT and MD.
</div>

## Current Featured Projects

<div class="research-card-grid">

<a class="research-card-link" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.14228" target="_blank">
<div class="research-card">
<div class="research-card-title">ChargeDIFF (Nature Communications, 2026)</div>
<div class="research-card-image">
<img src="assets/chargediff.png" alt="ChargeDIFF">
</div>
<div class="research-topics">
<span class="research-topic-card">Inverse Design</span>
<span class="research-topic-card">Diffusion Models</span>
<span class="research-topic-card">Generative AI</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</a>

<a class="research-card-link" href="https://www.nature.com/articles/s41467-024-55390-9" target="_blank">
<div class="research-card">
<div class="research-card-title">MOFFUSION (Nat. Commun., 2025)</div>
<div class="research-card-image">
<img src="assets/moffusion.png" alt="MOFFUSION">
</div>
<div class="research-topics">
<span class="research-topic-card">Inverse Design</span>
<span class="research-topic-card">Diffusion Models</span>
<span class="research-topic-card">Generative AI</span>
</div>
</div>
</a>

<a class="research-card-link" href="https://advanced.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1002/aenm.202300442" target="_blank">
<div class="research-card">
<div class="research-card-title">F-COF for K+ Ion Battery (Adv. Energy Mater., 2023)</div>
<div class="research-card-image">
<img src="assets/fcof.png" alt="F-COF">
</div>
<div class="research-topics">
<span class="research-topic-card">Density Functional Theory</span>
<span class="research-topic-card">Electronic Structure</span>
</div>
</div>
</a>

<a class="research-card-link" href="https://pubs.rsc.org/en/content/articlehtml/2024/ta/d3ta06274k" target="_blank">
<div class="research-card">
<div class="research-card-title">ZeoDIFF (J. Mater. Chem. A, 2024)</div>
<div class="research-card-image">
<img src="assets/zeodiff.png" alt="F-COF">
</div>
<div class="research-topics">
<span class="research-topic-card">Inverse Design</span>
<span class="research-topic-card">Diffusion Models</span>
<span class="research-topic-card">Generative AI</span>
</div>
</div>
</a>

<a class="research-card-link" href="https://pubs.acs.org/doi/full/10.1021/acs.chemmater.2c01822" target="_blank">
<div class="research-card">
<div class="research-card-title">Genetic Algorithm for MOFs (Chem. Mater., 2023)</div>
<div class="research-card-image">
<img src="assets/genetic.png" alt="Genetic">
</div>
<div class="research-topics">
<span class="research-topic-card">Inverse Design</span>
<span class="research-topic-card">Genetic Algorithm</span>
<span class="research-topic-card">GCMC Simulation</span>
</div>
</div>
</a>



</div>
